patch_history.raw: Boom Bot Can now be concussed. v

all_changes.context_label: Can now be concussed

patch_history.raw: Blast Pack Can now be affected by Slows while midair with Blast Pack. If Slowed, the force from Blast Pack will be reduced, similar to how slows affect other Dashes v

all_changes.context_label: Can now be affected by Slows while midair with Blast Pack
all_changes.description: Can now be affected by Slows while midair with Blast Pack

patch_history.raw: Fixed her hair so it wouldn’t flicker during certain movements in Agent select. v
Paint Shells Fixed an issue where the VFX would persist across rounds v
Blast Pack & Showstopper Explosion VFX has been updated to more accurately indicate hitboxes Visual effects will exist in world for a shorter period of time for more gameplay clarity v
Blast Pack Fixed an issue where Blast Pack could knock back Skye’s Trailblazer and Tejo’s Stealth Drone through walls. v
Blast Pack Fixed a bug where Blast Pack’s explosion was slightly smaller at the tip of the explosion since the explosion changes that went live in v

Gameplay logic around ability effects themed as explosions has been updated. Explosions should behave more consistently in how they deal damage. Undocumented Blast Pack Damage multiplier to objects decreased x
v

Blast Pack Raze’s satchels no longer explode for damage/knockback upon opponent destruction. Raze’s horizontal velocity when satcheling has been slowed. Satchel explosion audio has been updated to be audible farther away to ensure enemies can hear the first satchel when a Raze double satchels. v

all_changes.context_label: no longer explode for damage/knockback upon opponent destruction
all_changes.description: no longer explode for damage/knockback upon opponent destruction

patch_history.raw: Blast Pack Audio for traveling through air is now louder for enemies while traveling towards them v

Paint Shells Primary grenade explosion radius 6m >>> 5.5m. Secondary grenades explosion radius 6m >>> 5.25m. Primary grenade explosion minimum damage 15 >>> 1. Secondary grenades explosion minimum damage 15 >>> 1. Damage multiplier to enemy utility 250% >>> 100%. Blast Pack Satchel doesn’t deal damage until fully armed. Satchel arm time increased 0.5 seconds >>> 1.5. Updated SFX for beep after arm time. This is an undocumented change v

It will now bounce off the wall per usual v
